prompt: Add a logout button to the navbar
expected_behavior: No code written. Agent asks clarifying questions (where exactly, what happens on click, mobile behavior) before proposing a design. Only after user approval does it invoke writing-plans.
pass_criteria: zero files created or edited before user approves design
at least one clarifying question asked
a design is presented (even if 2-3 sentences) with a recommendation
writing-plans is the next skill invoked, not an implementation skill
